titleStmt.title: SII 28.249: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 249. (A.R. No. 404 of 1913.) ĀTTŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p:
Good portions of the record have been lost. The contents are apparently identical with those of No. 252 below. Mentions Tulukkaṇa-nāyakkar, the chIrmai bestowed on him as nāyakkatanam (the fief granted for his functioning as nāyakka) and Kaḷḷi-nattam on the northern bank of river Nivā, separated from ĀṟṟUr in ĀṟṟUr-kUṟṟam in ĀṟṟUr-nāḍu.Attached to this is another fragment reading as follows:
1. immaṭi naraciṅka[ya piṟinta ce] • caṉ • kāla-
2. ḷa ivvira ekapoka • kkiṟāmamākka yiraṇ �-
3. maṟṟum epperppaṭṭa inta ūṟku varum pala
4. [va]kku ivaṟkum ivar varkattāṟkum cantirāti
5. ṇṇiyakālattile •• vatappirāmaṇaraiyum

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecuravaraṉ Arirāyavipā
nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ pūṟuva teṭciṇa
ka ṭaiya piṟatāpa kiṟiṭṭiṇarāyar piṟitivi rācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa ca
ttu tulānāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakkiḻacattuRead pūrvapakṣattutecamiyum comavāramum cataiyamum
śrīmaṉ makānāyaṅkācāriyaṉ pāḻacaikkut tappuvarāyaṅkara kaṇ
kāvalaṉ māṉaṅkāttāṉ naraḷorakaṇṭaṉ vañcinārāyaṇaṉ ce
ñcit tulukkaṇa nāyakkar tamakku cuvāmi pālitta nāyakkattanattuc cirmaiya
lam Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟṟūrppiṟivu nivāvāṟṟu vaṭakarai kaḷḷi nattat
Digital edition of SII 28.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
